title: blob: Blob/convert for thumbnail generation (Blob2 capability)
description:
Implement Blob/convert in blob.rs (JMAP-BLOBEXT / blob2 capability):
- Detect urn:ietf:params:jmap:blob2 in session capabilities
- Blob/convert request: accountId, fromBlobId, type ('image/webp'), width, height
- Response: blobId of converted image
- Use case: request thumbnail preview instead of downloading full image blob
- Fixture test: mock blob2 /convert response

Fixture file: tests/fixtures/blob_convert.json
